data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Opt-in/opt-out management' within the SMS Reminder System. However, the evidence does not include any API reads or state checks that demonstrate the functionality for managing user opt-in or opt-out preferences. The linked use cases and prior step evidence do not address this specific requirement, indicating a clear gap in meeting the necessary criteria.
gaps: No evidence of opt-in/opt-out management functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the opt-in/opt-out management requirement.
